response:
Emily started with 25 dogs at her center located at [address] and added 4 puppies on Thursday plus 1 stray on Friday to reach a total of 30 animals before the weekend began. The adoption event on Saturday saw 2 families take 3 dogs each, meaning 6 dogs left the facility, so the current count is 24 dogs waiting for their new homes at [location].

The rescue team is now preparing for the next intake at [date] while updating the records for [dogname] and checking the medical status of [vaccine]. They need to contact [vetname] regarding the health of the new arrivals and ensure the [donation] amount covers the food for the remaining [number] dogs in the shelter.
